APPROVE
Implementation is minimal and on-spec: a single `LoadAndResolve` helper that delegates to `LoadWithWorkingDir` + `Resolve`, returning a sealed `ResolvedConfig` (defaults+overrides) alongside any load error. Tests cover the success path, override precedence, and the load-error path including assertion that overrides survive while a defaulted field (ReviewMaxRetries) remains at its default. artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T145013-6735d560/reviewer-stream.log

success
Implementation is minimal and on-spec: a single `LoadAndResolve` helper that delegates to `LoadWithWorkingDir` + `Resolve`, returning a sealed `ResolvedConfig` (defaults+overrides) alongside any load error. Tests cover the success path, override precedence, and the load-error path including assertion that overrides survive while a defaulted field (ReviewMaxRetries) remains at its default. Stays within the declared scope (only `resolved.go` and `resolved_test.go` modified).
